query:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.name, u.role,
       edp.businessDate, edp.totalPoints, edp.kpiAchievementRate, edp.finalKpiScore, edp.attendanceFlag,
       COALESCE((SELECT SUM(stc.points) FROM support_task_compensations stc WHERE stc.userId = u.id AND stc.businessDate = edp.businessDate), 0) AS supportPoints
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN engineer_daily_productivity edp ON edp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name IN ('дЅіз©Ћ','жЎ”жў—йЃ”ж›ј') OR u.username IN ('дЅіз©Ћ','жЎ”жў—йЃ”ж›ј','geng03')
ORDER BY u.id, edp.businessDate DESC
LIMIT 100;
